title: Batch
description: Batch mass VAT number validations for due dates. Add VAT numbers in bulk or append VAT numbers incrementally to your existing batch process, then start it whenever required.

created.description: ISO date at which the object was created.

queries.description: Array of all queries in the order of your input.

queries_ignored.description: Array of all queries which are of invalid format. Ignored queries are automatically identified upon your input. Its items will not be validated.

scheduled.description: ISO date at which the object status was changed to `scheduled`. Defaults to `null` while the status is `pending`.

succeeded_count.description: The number of `validations` where `valid` is `true` or `false`. It’s an indicator for how far the batch has progressed.

updated.description: ISO date at which the object was updated.

validations.description: Array of the first 20 validation objects in the order of `queries`. If an `id` is shown in the object, it was created for the batch and you can retrieve it individually. See [validation object](https://vatstack.com/docs/validations) for reference.
